item.title: DTCC launches tokenized stock pilot with BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan; commercial launch set for October 2026
UK Treasury forms tokenization taskforce with BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley, and UBS
Stripe, Coinbase, Mastercard, Visa, and BlackRock launch Open USD stablecoin alongside 140 business partners
Six U.S. agencies miss July 18 GENIUS Act deadline for stablecoin rules; compliance window extends to January 2027
Circle receives final OCC approval for national trust bank, placing USDC custody under direct federal oversight
SEC schedules three July crypto rulemaking proposals covering token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and trading venues
EU MiCA now fully in force; crypto firms serving EU customers must hold a MiCA license or cease operations
BNY Mellon expands Circle partnership to enable institutional mint, burn, and custody of USDC on Ethereum and Solana
White House convenes senators for Clarity Act talks; ethics clause blocking crypto-official profits remains key holdout
U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve holds 328,000 BTC but custody structure stalls amid Treasury-Commerce dispute
Ostium loses $18M USDC to oracle-manipulation exploit on Arbitrum via fraudulent future-dated oracle reports
Crypto hacks totaled $1.3 billion across 344 incidents in H1 2026; wallet compromise now the costliest attack vector
Banks race to build stablecoin custody and mint-burn infrastructure ahead of GENIUS Act compliance deadline
